channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole is getting bigger next to the storm drain, 21st April
item.description:
Pothole is getting bigger next to the storm drain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 21st April
item.description:
Household rubbish continually dumped on the pavement every night and strewn across the road and pavement by foxes what a eye sore and health hazard
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over Pleydell Avenue pavements near cars, 21st April
item.description:
Litter all over left hand side of Pleydell Avenue near parked cars from N1 to N 45 of Pleydell
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 21st April
item.description:
Again someone dumped here rubbish. Please attend and remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23,24, Craylands, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped beds and litter in locatio ///trendy.plots.dust, 21st April
item.description:
Fly tipped Beds and litter scattered by fox on both sides of Anerley Road near location ///trendy.plots.dust please look both side of the pavements

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in Alleyway, 21st April
item.description:
Rubbish and litter all up and down the alleyway from Holly Hill Road to Riverdale road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holly Hill Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign not collected, 21st April
item.description:
Sign left after completion of road works. Corner of Coates Hill Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coates Hill Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on footpath, 21st April
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Bin overflowing, 21st April
item.description:
No appropriate bin for residents leading to daily bin overflowing with foxes breaking apart bin bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chute blocked and stuck open, 21st April
item.description:
Chute is blocked and door is stuck open causing the entire block to smell like bins. It has been like this for almost 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyall Avenue, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside dudley court shorts gardens stepped entrance, 21st April
item.description:
The drain grill is blocked with solid mud that can not be pushed through with a screwdriver and apears to thick dry mud.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Short's Gardens, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 21st April
item.description:
Bike abandoned on pavement making it hard for me to get by, I am disabled and getting past it caused me to fall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop lines are faded, 21st April
item.description:
Stop lines are faded - needs repainting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
